{"analysis":"Found major_gc.c and major_gc.h. Let me also look for sweep-related files and examine the GC source code. Since there are no .orig/.bak files and no git history, I need to understand the code, try to build it, see the crash, and then fix it.","plan":"Look for sweep-related files in the runtime, read HACKING.adoc for build instructions, and also look at recently modified files to identify what was changed.","commands":[{"keystrokes":"find /app/ocaml/runtime -name '*sweep*' -o -name '*gc*' | head -20
","duration":0.5},{"keystrokes":"ls /app/ocaml/runtime/caml/
","duration":0.1},{"keystrokes":"cat /app/ocaml/HACKING.adoc | head -100
","duration":0.5}]}
